## Meeting Purpose

[Sai's direct outreach to explore content roles at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sai, a content generalist at WAMIT (Game Rant), is seeking a new role due to a perceived lack of vision and growth.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Jason suggested Sai apply for the Managing Editor role and offered an invite to the GrowthX community as a potential path to collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Sai proposed a content strategy to establish GrowthX as an authority in AEO, GEO, and SEO, citing Marcel's early success as a model.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Topics

### Sai's Background & Motivation

  - [**Current Role:** Full-time content generalist at WAMIT (Game Rant, The Gamer), handling interactive maps, editorial, writing, and community moderation.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Motivation for Change:** Seeking a new role with clearer vision and growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Outreach Strategy:** Contacted multiple GrowthX team members (Jason, Marcel) to bypass traditional applications and secure a direct conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### GrowthX Role Exploration

  - [**Applied For:** AI Content role (now closed).](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Hesitated On:** Managing Editor role, due to its EMEA region specification.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Jason's Advice:** Apply for the Managing Editor role regardless; Jason will flag the application for the team, noting their preference for ex-journalists (e.g., from TechCrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy

  - [**Context:** Sai's initial LinkedIn post for Jason was rushed (2-hour turnaround) to secure the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Proposal:** A dedicated project to analyze Jason's past content (posts, transcripts) to master his tone and produce high-quality, consistent posts.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Goal:** Establish GrowthX as the authority on AEO, GEO, and SEO by expanding the blog and driving community engagement on platforms like Discord.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Invite Sai to the GrowthX community.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [**Sai:** Apply for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Jason:** Flag Sai's application for the hiring team.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Sai:** Explore the community for content collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/axSBgGpezzbDW13-CQrb4qRQhRj5_z_k?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
